neqsim.process.safety.esd

    Runs the initial steady-state calculation when configured.

    EmergencyShutdownTestRunner.run(ProcessSystem process, EmergencyShutdownTestPlan plan, List<ProcessLogic> logicSequences)

    Runs an ESD dynamic test with one or more process logic sequences.
